add_ons.name: Generator Package
add_ons.description: Onboard generator with unlimited hours for off-grid camping

add_ons.name: Kitchen Kit
add_ons.description: Pots, pans, utensils, and basic cooking supplies

add_ons.name: Bike Rack
add_ons.description: Hitch-mounted bike rack for up to 4 bikes

add_ons.name: Bedding Package
add_ons.description: Fresh linens, pillows, and blankets for all beds

add_ons.name: RV GPS Navigation
add_ons.description: RV-specific GPS with height and weight restrictions

maintenance_records.notes: Scheduled maintenance for Road Runner Wind
